name: unofficial-clay-cli
description: Run Clay from your terminal or your AI agent - 50 commands, declarative playbooks, community workflow templates, and safety gates. Unofficial, not affiliated with Clay.

scripts.check: node --check clay-v2.js && node --check plan-playbook.js && node --check intake-request.js && node --check prepare-sample-run.js && node --check advance-sample-run.js && node --check scale-gate.js && node --check simulate-full-loop.js && node --check completion-audit.js && node --check profile-context.js && node --check prompt-library.js && node --check workbook-parity.js && node --check integration-library.js && node --check proof-packet.js && node --check proof-harness.js && node --check provenance.js && node --check preflight-sample-run.js && node --check hydrate-sample-run.js && node --check collect-evidence.js && node --check quality-report.js && node --check validate-config.js && node --check test-clay-v2-model-compat.js && node --check test-clay-v2-input-deps.js && node --check test-integration-library.js && node --check test-proof-packet.js && node --check test-proof-harness.js && node --check test-redaction.js && node --check test-playbooks.js && node --check test-prompt-library.js && node --check test-plan-playbook.js && node --check test-intake-request.js && node --check test-prepare-sample-run.js && node --check test-advance-sample-run.js && node --check test-scale-gate.js && node --check test-simulate-full-loop.js && node --check test-completion-audit.js && node --check test-profile-context.js && node --check test-workbook-parity.js && node --check test-preflight-sample-run.js && node --check test-hydrate-sample-run.js && node --check test-collect-evidence.js && node --check test-quality-report.js && node --check test-ignore-coverage.js && node --check test-agent-instructions.js && node --check test-clay-v2-contract.js && node --check test-public-readiness.js && node --check test-validate-config.js && node --check catalog-normalizer.js && node --check package-rollup-report.js && node --check safety-classifier.js && node --check proof-strategy-classifier.js && node --check catalog-status.js && node --check action-template-generator.js && node --check catalog-promotion-guard.js && node --check catalog-coverage-dashboard.js && node --check test-catalog-normalizer.js && node --check test-package-rollup-report.js && node --check test-safety-classifier.js && node --check test-proof-strategy-classifier.js && node --check test-catalog-status.js && node --check test-action-template-generator.js && node --check test-catalog-promotion-guard.js && node --check test-catalog-coverage-dashboard.js && node --check blocked-action-report.js && node --check test-blocked-action-report.js && node --check generate-package-playbooks.js && node --check test-generate-package-playbooks.js && node --check catalog-delta.js && node --check test-catalog-delta.js && node --check merge-catalog-shards.js && node --check test-merge-catalog-shards.js
scripts.smoke:validate: node clay-v2.js validate-spec specs/declarative-smoke.yaml && node clay-v2.js validate-spec specs/people-source-preview-smoke.yaml && node clay-v2.js validate-spec specs/company-source-preview-smoke.yaml && for f in specs/templates/*.yaml; do node clay-v2.js validate-spec "$f"; done
scripts.test:all: npm run check && npm run smoke:validate && npm run test:redaction && npm run test:playbooks && npm run test:prompts && npm run test:intake && npm run test:prepare && npm run test:advance && npm run test:scale && npm run test:simulate && npm run test:audit && npm run test:profile && npm run test:parity && npm run test:plan && npm run test:preflight && npm run test:hydrate && npm run test:evidence && npm run test:report && npm run test:config && npm run test:ignore && npm run test:agents && npm run test:contract && npm run test:model-compat && npm run test:input-deps && npm run test:integrations && npm run test:proof-packet && npm run test:proof-harness && npm run test:public && npm run test:catalog && npm run test:package-rollup && npm run test:safety && npm run test:proof-strategy && npm run test:catalog-status && npm run test:actions && npm run test:catalog-promotion && npm run test:catalog-coverage && npm run test:blocked-actions && npm run test:package-playbooks && npm run test:catalog-delta && npm run test:merge-shards
